  (: If 
    (-> Bool Atom Atom Atom))
  (= 
    (If $cond $then $else) 
    (if $cond $then $else))
;;; (: TupleConcat (-> Any Any AnyRet))
  (= 
    (TupleConcat $Ev1 $Ev2) 
    (let 
      ($V1 $V2) 
      ($Ev1 $Ev2) 
      (collapse (superpose ((superpose $V1) (superpose $V2))))))
;; In file as:  
  !(TupleConcat 
    (a b c) 
    (e f g))
;; To unit test case:
  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (TupleConcat 
      (a b c) 
      (e f g)) 
    ( (a b c e f g)))

[

;
;; METTA-MORPH-TESTS.SUPERCOLLAPSE.01

; 
; EVAL TEST
; took 0.002 secs. (2.30 milliseconds) 

  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (TupleConcat 
      (a b c) 
      (e f g)) 
    ( (a b c e f g)))

  (loonit_success  
    (equal_enough_for_test  
      ( (a b c e f g)) 
      ( (a b c e f g))))


  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_6184))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqualToResult 
          (TupleConcat 
            (a b c) 
            (e f g)) 
          ( (a b c e f g))) $_3982) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_4426) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_3982 $_4454) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3320) $_4454)))))




  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_6184))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqualToResult 
          (TupleConcat 
            (a b c) 
            (e f g)) 
          ( (a b c e f g))) $_3982) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_4426) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_3982 $_4454) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3320) $_4454)))))
